tech_lead.name: Tech Lead
tech_lead.gameEffect: +15% effective daily capacity for everyone whose board role is Developer. Stacking is summed per role type; the engine caps the global bonus per specialty.

scrum_master.name: Scrum Master
scrum_master.gameEffect: Lowers handoff rework chance for the whole team. Multiple Scrum Masters stack up to an engine cap.

setup.title: Match setup
setup.lede: Build the team, traits, synergy matrix, and backlog. When you start, the configuration is frozen until you return to setup.
setup.hypothesisBody: Each member sets a daily delivery range (min–max); each working day an integer is drawn uniformly from that range. Only then multipliers apply: specialty column (~×2 + traits), then global job-role bonuses (e.g. Tech Lead). With no range set, the legacy 1…dice max applies (max affected by traits). On Dev, collaborative cards use synergy and pair traits. Handoffs use γ and traits; low synergy raises rework; Scrum Master reduces handoff rework for everyone. On Daily and Sprint Review days a random event may fire (sickness, vacation, etc.) according to the configured probability — see the list during the match.
setup.deliveryHint: Uniform draw per day in this range; specialist and job-role multipliers apply afterward (engine caps daily effective capacity).

memberSynergy.byPersonHint: Pairwise value with each teammate. Uncheck «Bidirectional» to set direction (me → other) per card; handoffs use only the sender’s view; collaboration uses the average of both directions.
memberSynergy.byRoleHint: Extra adjustment when working with anyone in that role (added to pair synergy; total clamped to −1…+1).
memberSynergy.needAnotherMember: Add another member to edit per-person synergy.

synergy.needTwoMembers: Add at least two members to edit synergy.
synergy.hint: Values between −1 (friction) and +1 (alignment). Used in collaboration on Dev and in handoffs between stages.
synergy.matrixSyncedWithMemberCards: The matrix below is the same per-person synergy as on each member card.
synergy.matrixAsymmetricHint: Non-bidirectional pair: edit values on member cards (me → teammate arrows).

cfd.title: Cumulative Flow Diagram (CFD)
cfd.empty: Run days to see the CFD.

play.title: Match
play.calendarHint: Advance one day to start the calendar.

dailyEvents.catalogIntro: On Daily Scrum and Sprint Review days, with the probability set in setup, one event per day may occur. It applies to effective capacity after the base roll, specialist multiplier, and job-role bonuses.

member_sick.name: Sick team member
member_sick.effect: Effective capacity for the drawn member is 0 for the day (no delivery points).

member_vacation.name: Vacation / absence
member_vacation.effect: Effective capacity for the drawn member is 0 (planned absence).

member_half_day.name: Half day
member_half_day.effect: Effective capacity for the drawn member is multiplied by 0.5.

infrastructure_outage.name: Infrastructure incident
infrastructure_outage.effect: Everyone: effective capacity ×0.78 (CI, VPN, or unstable environment).

good_vibes_break.name: Good mood / productive break
good_vibes_break.effect: Everyone: effective capacity ×1.12 (capped by the engine's daily ceiling).

engine.sprintReviewDay: Sprint Review: last working day of the sprint.
engine.retroNarrative: Retrospective: team reflection (no mechanical effect in v1).
engine.dailyEventMemberSick: Event: {{memberName}} is sick — no capacity today.
engine.dailyEventMemberVacation: Event: {{memberName}} away (vacation or similar) — no capacity today.
engine.dailyEventMemberHalfDay: Event: {{memberName}} on a half day — reduced capacity.
engine.dailyEventTeamMeeting: Event: meeting-heavy day — team capacity reduced.
engine.dailyEventOutage: Event: infrastructure incident — team capacity reduced.
engine.dailyEventGoodVibes: Event: good vibes — small capacity boost for everyone.

comunicador.name: Communicator
comunicador.gameEffect: +0.08 to handoff multiplier (less friction between stages).

mentor.name: Mentor
mentor.description: Helps the pair in collaborative work.

veterano.name: Veteran
veterano.description: Strong technical command in their specialty.

hiperfoco.name: Hyperfocus
hiperfoco.gameEffect: −1 to dice maximum (lower daily throughput cap).

evita_conflito.name: Conflict avoidant
evita_conflito.description: Holds back doubts when dynamics with the pair are poor.
